heroTitle: Translate Academic PDFs without losing a single pixel.
heroSubtitle: Layout-preserving translation for papers, manuals, and books — formulas, figures, and structure stay faithful.
heroUploadLead: Translate PDF, keep layout. Powered by DeepSeek.
heroUploadSub: Your document stays visually faithful — formulas, figures, and structure preserved.
heroLanguagesHint: English, Chinese, Spanish, French, Italian, Greek, Japanese, Korean, and more — pick source and target in the form.
compareHint: Drag the slider to compare before and after.
stepsSectionDescription: From upload to download and history:
step1Desc: Drop a PDF or pick a file. Large documents are supported within the limits shown on the translate page.
step2Desc: Select the document language so the engine translates from the correct source.
step3Desc: Pick the language you want the PDF translated into, then start the job.
step4Desc: When the job finishes, download the translated PDF from the same screen.
step5Desc: Reopen finished translations from History while the file is still available.
seoTitle: Academic PDF translation that keeps every pixel
seoP1: Translate PDF Online helps researchers and teams convert scholarly PDFs between languages without breaking columns, equations, tables, or figures. Our pipeline is tuned for dense academic layout, not plain text dumps.
seoP2: Many language pairs are available in the UI. Use the History column to reopen recent uploads and translation jobs without uploading the same PDF again.
translationFailedNoDetail: Check worker logs for details or contact support.
translationFailedContact: Translation did not complete. For any questions or support, contact
deleteDocumentConfirm: This action cannot be undone. The file will be permanently removed from our servers. Continue?
translationPatience: Translation and AI model loading may take a moment for multiple pages. Thank you for your patience.
downloadError: This file could not be downloaded. Please sign in with the account that created this task and try again.
downloadErrorNotFound: Translation file not found. It may still be generating, or try again later.
uploadFileNotice: Your file is transmitted over encrypted connections. It is kept for 7 days for download, then permanently deleted from our servers.
previewLoadFailedRetry: Preview failed to load. Click refresh to retry.
creditsLoadHint: Sign in to see your credit balance.
uploadFirstHint: Upload a PDF on the left, then choose languages and start translation.
historyWorkflowHint:
Roughly ~30 seconds per page on average.
After you submit, you may leave this page and check History later.
Failed jobs are not charged—you can submit again.
Support: hello@translatepdfonline.com
pageRangeAdjustedNotice: You entered {userRange}. This document has {docPages} pages; translation used pages {effectiveRange}.
pageRangeNoOverlap: The page range you chose does not overlap this document ({docPages} pages).
